calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-08-2026 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Tax/Strike Plaintiff'S Costs; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Trang T. Tran
Off Calendar Nov-04-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (by Zoom):
Jordan Sannipoli, Esq. 619-374-4100 Bickel Sannipoli APC for Plaintiff.
Trang Tran, Esq. 626-577-9500 Atkinson Andelson Loya Ruud & Romo for Defendant.

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice to contest the TR was received from Defense.

Argued. Ms. Tran requests travel expenses of legal assisiant to be stricken. Ms. Sannipoli responds fees incurred by representative from office is reasonable. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT AMERICAN HONDA MOTOR CO., INC.'s Motion To Tax/Strike Plaintiff's Costs.

1 - Defendant American Honda Motor Co., Inc.'s Motion to Tax Costs is DENIED.

(see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Motion And Plaintiffs Motion For Payment Of Attorneys Fees And Reimbursement Of Costs And Expenses
Off Calendar Nov-05-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Jordan Sannipoli, Esq. 619-374-4100 Bickel Sannipoli APC for Plaintiff.
Trang Tran, Esq. 626-577-9500 Atkinson Andelson Loya Ruud & Romo for Defendant.

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice to contest the TR was received from Defense.

Argued. Ms. Sannipoli submits to TR. Ms. Tran argues clerical fees of 17.1 hours should not be recoverable and should be denied. Ms. Sannipoli responds lines are blurred, paralegal and secretarial time are reasonable, nominal amount of time, legal tasks went into discovery, not purely clerical tasks. The Court comments.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF TODD SENIGAR's Motion For Payment Of Attorneys Fees And Reimbursement Of Costs And Expenses.

2 - Plaintiff Todd Senigar's Motion for Attorney's fees.

Taken Under Submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Motion And Plaintiffs Motion For Payment Of Attorneys Fees And Reimbursement Of Costs And Expenses
Off Calendar Oct-17-2025 Continued To Nov-04-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Prior to the hearing, parties informed the court re a conflict on 10/31/25. The parties agreed to an 11/4/25 continuance date.

No appearances in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF TODD SENIGAR's Motion For Payment Of Attorneys Fees And Reimbursement Of Costs And Expenses.

Amended:
Continued on the court's motion to November 4, 2025.

Judge: Samuel K. Feng, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/SKF)
